required_plugins.name: WPGraphQL
required_plugins.purpose: GraphQL API for published content, previews, users, media, and taxonomies.

required_plugins.name: Advanced Custom Fields Pro
required_plugins.purpose: Editorial field groups for articles, glossary, homepage, legal pages, advertise, and site settings.

required_plugins.name: WPGraphQL for ACF
required_plugins.purpose: Expose ACF field groups to WPGraphQL.

required_plugins.name: Yoast SEO
required_plugins.purpose: Editor-managed title, description, canonical, and Open Graph metadata.

required_plugins.name: Add WPGraphQL SEO
required_plugins.purpose: Expose Yoast SEO fields through WPGraphQL.

required_plugins.name: WPGraphQL Smart Cache
required_plugins.purpose: Persisted operations, object cache integration, and API performance.

required_plugins.name: Redis Object Cache
required_plugins.purpose: Back WordPress object caching with Redis on the managed host.

required_plugins.name: tecMAMBO Headless Helper
required_plugins.purpose: Disable public theme traffic, provide preview links, and call Next.js revalidation webhooks.

optional_alternatives.name: Rank Math SEO plus a WPGraphQL bridge
optional_alternatives.note: Use only if the editorial team chooses Rank Math instead of Yoast. Keep the frontend SEO mapper aligned.
